traces.mapping_rationale: Direct bank match for deriving deck, cabin number, and ship side from the raw Cabin string.
Direct bank match for extracting PassengerGroup and PassengerNumber from PassengerId.
Selected because the notebook applies the CryoSleep zero-spend consistency rule to the amenity spending columns.
Selected because the notebook zero-imputes missing amenity spend values before deriving total-spend features.
Direct bank match for aggregating the five amenity spending columns into TotalSpend.
Selected because the notebook derives a binary no-spending indicator from the TotalSpend feature.
Selected as the notebook-backed global median Age imputation used in the reference baseline.
Selected because the notebook mode-imputes the main categorical and boolean fields.
Direct bank match for counting passengers per PassengerGroup and joining the result back as GroupSize.
Selected because the notebook label-encodes the main nominal columns for the lightweight reference baseline.
Selected because the notebook drops PassengerId, Name, and Cabin after their structured features have been extracted.

omitted_notebook_steps.note: Model training and prediction are part of the notebook workflow but are outside the action-bank preprocessing output.
Submission writing is not represented as a candidate bank action for this benchmark task.
